div.h1: Race Condition: Concurrent pool_alloc() Without Mutex
div.p: Two threads read the same free_list_head, causing duplicate allocation
Solution: Wrap pool_alloc() and pool_free() with pthread_mutex_lock() / pthread_mutex_unlock() to ensure only one thread accesses shared state at a time.

Legend: 🔴 Red = Allocated twice (corruption!) 🟠 Orange = On free list
⬜ Gray = Lost memory leak

ul.li: Memory corruption when both threads write to 0x1000
